subcodes.first_line: O spiritual star! When the caravan of the All-Merciful Luminary arrived, the star of spiritual fortune dawned with radiant effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کوکب روحانی چون موکب نیر رحمانی رسید کوکب اقبال روحانیان دمید از شعشعه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @education of children; moral education, @Manifestation of God as sun, @praise and encouragement
